name: ios-simulator
description: Build, run, view, and interact with iOS apps on the Apple Simulator.

interface.shortDescription: Build, run, view, and interact with iOS apps on the Apple Simulator.
interface.longDescription: Build, run, view, and interact with iOS apps on the Apple Simulator. Use when the user asks to build, run, install, stream, screenshot, tap, scroll, swipe, rotate, grant permissions, or inspect an app on an iOS/iPadOS/watchOS Simulator.
